emails.subject: vacation day
emails.body: All: I would like to take Friday, Sept. 29 as a vacation day. Please advise if there are any conflicts. Thanks. Sara

emails.body: I would like to take Friday, March 9 as a vacation day. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com
